prose: The Fukui electrophilicity index (f+) at the most electrophilic site of formaldehyde was computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level with a tier 'standard' basis set in the gas phase. The calculation was performed with charge 0 and multiplicity 1, based on the molecule xyz file provided. The resulting value of the Fukui index is approximately 0.46778 (units are dimensionless).
